species.title: Let's get to know your pet
species.subtitle: Every species has its own signals. Start by telling us who's about to get all this care.

lifeStage.title: What life stage are they in?
lifeStage.subtitle: Puppies/kittens, adults, and seniors need a different kind of attention — this shapes everything we'll track from here on.

puppy.label: Puppy / Kitten
puppy.description: Fast growth, vaccines on schedule, and plenty of curiosity to watch for.

adult.label: Adult
adult.description: The stage of keeping a healthy routine and noticing small changes.

senior.label: Senior
senior.description: Closer care — this is when small signs matter the most.

lifeStage.error: Choose a life stage to continue.

profile.title: A bit more about them
profile.subtitle: This helps us understand what's normal for your pet, specifically.
profile.birthDateModeLabel: How would you like to enter their age?
profile.birthDateError: Choose a valid date — it can't be in the future.
profile.approximateAgeError: Enter at least years or months.
profile.weightError: Enter a valid weight greater than zero.
profile.photoHelp: A good photo helps you recognize your pet at a glance.
profile.photoUploadError: Couldn't upload the photo. Please try again.

baseline.title: Your pet's DNA
baseline.subtitle: Every pet is unique. Over the next {{days}} days, we'll observe their routine to learn what's NORMAL for them — and that's what lets us notice when something changes.
baseline.explanation: One quick check-in a day is all it takes. No rush — the goal is to get to know them, not to diagnose.
baseline.submitError: Couldn't save your pet right now. Please try again.
